explanation: This is clearly a bug fix for infinite recursion in getMimeType method, explicitly labeled as a backport of gh-3576.
Enhancement request for RetrievalAugmentationAdvisor to support filter expressions, clearly relates to RAG and metadata filtering functionality.
Comprehensive proposal for implementing observability features in Spring AI models, with detailed technical specifications for telemetry and monitoring.
Bug with Bedrock chat model not properly streaming tools when using Suppliers vs Functions, affecting tool/function calling and streaming functionality.
Bug report about streaming metrics not being properly captured in observability system, affecting both streaming and observability functionality.

Issue describes a specific MCP (Model Control Protocol) server configuration problem where the content path works for GET requests but fails with 404 for POST requests to /mcp/message endpoint. Clear bug with detailed reproduction steps.
Issue clearly describes WatsonxAiChatModel using wrong API endpoints - using text/generation instead of text/chat. This is a Watson-specific bug with clear expected behavior.

Issue describes VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor not persisting assistant responses with Bedrock streaming. Clear chat memory and advisor problem with detailed investigation of the after() method not being called.

Issue describes NullPointerException in TokenTextSplitter when using TextReader with ByteArrayResource. Clear ETL/text processing bug with stack trace showing the problem in TextSplitter.createDocuments.
Issue requests a new API for deleting documents by filter expression in vector stores. This is clearly a vector store feature request for missing functionality.
